settings.label: The Science
settings.headline: The 3 Biological Shifts in Skin Over 40
settings.body: To choose the best skincare, you must first understand what is happening beneath the surface.

Collagen is the structural protein that gives your skin firmness and bounce. From your mid-20s, collagen production declines by about 1% every year. By the time you reach 40, this cumulative loss becomes visibly apparent. The skin matrix begins to weaken, leading to the formation of fine lines, deeper wrinkles, and a loss of structural volume.

In your 20s, your skin cells naturally renew every 28 days, constantly pushing fresh, luminous cells to the surface. After 40, this cycle can slow down dramatically, taking up to 45–60 days. This buildup of dead, senescent cells on the surface is the primary cause of the dull, lacklustre complexion often associated with mature skin.

As we enter perimenopause and menopause, declining estrogen levels lead to a reduction in sebum production and hyaluronic acid synthesis. The skin's protective lipid barrier becomes compromised, resulting in chronic dehydration, increased sensitivity, and a feeling of tightness that no standard moisturiser seems to resolve.

The Protocol
settings.headline: The Doctor-Led Protocol for Mature Skin
settings.subheadline: Treating skin over 40 requires moving beyond a basic 'cleanse and moisturise' routine. It requires a clinical protocol designed to stimulate regeneration, accelerate cellular turnover, and deeply fortify the barrier.

settings.name: Transforming Exfoliator
settings.why: You cannot hydrate dead skin cells. This exfoliator combines gentle physical spheres with a potent AHA blend to dissolve the bonds holding dead cells together, instantly brightening the complexion.

settings.name: CellRevive Exosome Cream
settings.why: Delivering 4 billion stem cell-derived exosomes per dose, it acts as a 'software update' for your skin, sending genetic instructions to repair damage and stimulate the structural matrix.

settings.name: Jellyfish Peptide X Antioxidant Serum
settings.why: Utilises a DNA-repair peptide (Juveleven) inspired by the immortal jellyfish to protect cellular integrity and smooth deep wrinkles.

settings.name: Ultimate A Night Cream
settings.why: Features micro-encapsulated retinol, released slowly into the dermis overnight, providing all the collagen-boosting benefits without the redness or flaking common in mature skin.

settings.name: Biocinamide Serum
settings.why: Delivers a potent dose of Niacinamide alongside advanced sphingolipids to rebuild the skin's protective mantle, lock in moisture, and reduce enlarged pores.

settings.name: Day Cream SPF 15
settings.why: Up to 90% of visible skin ageing is caused by UV exposure. This day cream provides essential daily defence while delivering deep hydration and collagen-supporting peptides.

settings.label: The Australian Factor
settings.headline: Protecting Your Investment
settings.body:
Living in Australia means our skin is subjected to some of the harshest environmental conditions on the planet. Up to 90% of visible skin ageing is caused by UV exposure. All the regenerative protocols in the world will be undone without daily protection.

At Aliangé, under the guidance of Dr. Alison Jamieson and her 40+ years of dermatological experience, we do not view these changes as something to 'fix' with superficial creams. We view them as biological processes that require targeted, clinical intervention.

settings.quote_text: At 40 and beyond, your skin has different biological needs. It requires science, not marketing. By adopting an Aliangé Protocol, you are delivering the precise molecular signals your skin needs to behave younger, stronger, and more resilient.

settings.headline: Stop Ageing. Start Regenerating.
